Who I Am

Madame Divine —
High Priestess

Madame Divine is my High Priestess name. I am of High Counsel — deeply connected to God/Source, with divine connections to my angels and spiritual guides. I have connected with several loved ones who have passed on, bringing clarity, closure, and healing to myself and the many others who have reached out to connect.

I am a Published Author & Poet — Emile Maria Rivera. My book Called by Fire, Crowned by Spirit carries the healing that my work in all forms was built to deliver. I am also an intentional handcrafted beader, an herbalist, a Curandera, and a Reiki practitioner.

My offerings span energy healing, Reiki sessions and attunements, candle work, honey jars, ritual work, herbalism, apothecary products, and sacred consultations that bring clarity, truth, and deep insight into self and all that surrounds us.

Faith and ritual practices work hand in hand. Together they achieve outcomes divinely aligned for us — rooted in purpose, guided by the divine.

I understand that many come to me as a last resort, or seeking trust and confirmation. I am not here to judge, nor to force any spiritual beliefs. Though many may judge what I do based on differences in belief systems and upbringings — I respect everyone's place, and I believe that to be mutual.

✦ Shop Intentional

"My ancestors came as healers. What I create carries that same medicine forward."

Every product in this apothecary is handcrafted — rooted in indigenous healing traditions, ancestral wisdom, and sacred intention. When you shop here, you are not just buying a product. You are choosing to shop with purpose. Each item is made in limited quantities. When it is gone, it is gone. What is created is created once — with full prayer and presence.

✦ How to Order: Click any Order Now button to send payment through the portal. After payment you must email Divinexintentions33@gmail.com with the following:

1. Your full name
2. Confirmation of payment (screenshot)
3. Contact information (phone or Instagram handle)
4. Shipping address — please double check your address before sending. Madame Divine is not responsible for orders shipped to an incorrect address.

Limited quantities — no restocks once sold. All sales are final.

Legal Disclaimer

All readings, rituals, energy work, and spiritual services offered by Madame Divine / Divine Intentions 33 are provided for entertainment, spiritual guidance, and personal enrichment purposes only. All services are intended for individuals 18 years of age or older.

Madame Divine is not a licensed therapist, medical professional, legal advisor, or financial advisor. Nothing shared during a reading or session should be interpreted as medical, psychological, legal, or financial advice. All information provided is spiritual in nature and should not replace professional consultation in any of these areas.

Readings and spiritual services do not guarantee specific outcomes. Results and experiences vary from person to person. By booking a session or purchasing any product or service from Divine Intentions 33, you acknowledge that you are doing so of your own free will and take full personal responsibility for any decisions made as a result of your session.

All sales are final. No refunds on deposits or completed ritual work. Madame Divine reserves the right to decline service to anyone at any time.

Divine Intentions 33 is not responsible for shipping delays or lost packages once an order has been confirmed as shipped. Customers are solely responsible for providing accurate shipping addresses. Orders shipped to incorrect addresses provided by the customer will not be reshipped or refunded.
